subcodes.first_line: O true friend! The letter of the twenty-third of Shawwal of this year arrived, concerning the achievement of unity, harmony and fellowship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار حقیقی نامه ۲۳ شهر شوال سنه حالیه رسید از حصول اتحاد و اتفاق و الفت و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @unity; oneness of humanity, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
